# Project Prompts

Use these in chat via `/` prompt picker or `Chat: Run Prompt...`.

- `Implement Change With Standards`
  - File: `implement-change-with-standards.prompt.md`
  - For normal feature/fix work with required standards.

- `Root Cause And Fix`
  - File: `root-cause-and-fix.prompt.md`
  - For test/runtime failures requiring investigation and durable fixes.

- `Release Readiness Check`
  - File: `release-readiness-check.prompt.md`
  - For end-to-end build, deploy, test, soak, and ship/no-ship decisions.

- `Update Hardware Firmware And Filesystems`
  - File: `update-hardware-firmware-and-filesystems.prompt.md`
  - For build and device update runs (firmware + filesystem) with endpoint health checks.
